infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: E Vision needs your location to share with clients when on the way.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: E Vision needs your location to share with clients when on the way.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: E Vision needs access to your photos to upload job completion photos.
